project.name: HonestNeed Coming Soon Landing Page
project.description: High-converting coming soon page for HonestNeed platform - community-driven fundraising and helping movement
project.purpose: Build anticipation, collect early adopter emails, showcase 3 premium offers, and drive movement participation before full platform launch

pageStructure.layout: Full viewport sections with fixed header, mobile-optimized navigation

content: Nav items: 'How it Works', 'Early Access', responsive menu toggle

content.headline: Join the Movement for Real Help
content.subheadline: HonestNeed connects communities with people who need support. Coming soon.
content.backgroundPattern: Animated gradient mesh or subtle grid pattern
content.visualElement: Animated illustrations or hero image carousel

content.headline: Why HonestNeed Matters
content.description: Traditional fundraising is complex, opaque, and often fails those who need it most

problems.title: High Barriers
problems.description: Complex platforms make it hard for people to ask for help

problems.title: Lack of Transparency
problems.description: Unclear where funds go and how they're used

content.headline: Meet Your Solution
content.description: Transparent, community-driven fundraising for real needs

features.title: Simple Setup
features.description: Start a campaign in minutes, not hours

features.title: Verified & Safe
features.description: Every campaign verified for authenticity and safety

features.title: Community Powered
features.description: Earn by sharing campaigns with your network

sections.layout: 3-column grid (responsive: 1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3 col desktop)

content.headline: Launch Offers: Limited Early Access
content.subtitle: Be among the first to access HonestNeed. Choose your commitment level.

steps.title: Track Impact

steps.title: Share Success

content.headline: Voices of Change
content.subtitle: Early testers share their experience with HonestNeed

testimonials.quote: I was able to share my story and my community responded. HonestNeed made it easy.
testimonials.author: Maria, Creator (Beta Tester)

testimonials.quote: Knowing my donation directly helps someone I know - this is real impact.
testimonials.author: James, Donor (Beta Tester)

testimonials.quote: The transparency and community feel sets HonestNeed apart.
testimonials.author: Lisa, Advocate (Beta Tester)

content.headline: Join the Movement
content.description: Get exclusive updates, early features, and be first to know when we launch.

form.successMessage: Thanks for joining! Check your email for exclusive updates.

faqs.question: When does HonestNeed launch?
faqs.answer: We're launching in [DATE]. Early access members get first priority onboarding!

faqs.question: Are the $9.99, $49.99, and $199.99 purchases refundable?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. No questions asked. Your email will receive a refund link.

faqs.question: What happens to my personal data?
faqs.answer: Your privacy is paramount. We follow GDPR and state privacy regulations. Data is never sold.

faqs.question: Can I use HonestNeed as a donor and creator?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Many users do both - give to others and also share their own needs.

faqs.question: How are campaigns verified?
faqs.answer: Our team verifies each campaign manually. We check identities and legitimacy before approval.

faqs.question: Is there a creator fee?
faqs.answer: No creator fees. We're free to use. Donors choose to give - no algorithms pushing more money out.

content.headline: Ready to Be Part of the Change?
content.description: Limited early access available. Get your spot before we reach capacity.

content: Social media links (Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok)

patterns.entrance: Staggered fade-in with subtle slide-up (100px to 0px, opacity 0 to 1)
patterns.scroll: Parallax effects on hero, fade-in on scroll for section headlines
patterns.interactive: Button hover scale (1 to 1.05), color transitions (200ms)
patterns.carousel: Smooth drag gestures, momentum scrolling on mobile
patterns.countdownTimer: Smooth number transitions with digit-swap animation

hoverEffects.cards: Scale 1.02, shadow elevation, subtle shadow glow
hoverEffects.links: Underline animation from left to right

performanceGuidelines: Use transform and opacity for animations (GPU accelerated)
Lazy load images and sections below fold
Reduce motion for users with prefers-reduced-motion

guidelines.xs_to_sm: Single column, full width sections, large touch targets (44x44px min)
guidelines.touch_interactions: Swipe for carousels, tap for accordions, bottom sheet modals
guidelines.typography: Readable sizes at all breakpoints, line lengths max 50-75 chars on desktop
guidelines.images: Responsive srcSet, WebP with fallbacks, lazy loading
guidelines.navbar: Hamburger menu on mobile (< 768px), full nav on desktop
guidelines.spacing: Tighter spacing on mobile (8px base unit), generous on desktop (16px)

header.styling: Subtle blur background, border-bottom on scroll
header.responsive: Mobile: hamburger + logo, Desktop: full nav + logo

elements: Background: Animated gradient mesh or hero image
heroSection.animations: Content fades in on load, background subtly moves on scroll

offerCards.layout: 3 cards, each with pricing, features, CTA
offerCards.highlightedCard: Larger scale, different accent color, badge
offerCards.features: Checkmark icons + text, truncated with 'see more' on mobile
offerCards.interactivity: Hover scale, shadow elevation, price highlight color

stepTimeline.elements: Step number, icon, title, description, connector lines
stepTimeline.animation: Staggered staggered-in on scroll from bottom

testimonialCarousel.layout: Scrollable on mobile, grid on desktop
testimonialCarousel.card: Quote, author, role, avatar, star rating
testimonialCarousel.navigation: Dots on mobile, arrows on desktop, keyboard navigation

newsletter.layout: Email input + button (stacked on mobile, inline on desktop)
newsletter.validation: Real-time email validation, error messages inline

buttons.animations: Scale on hover, loading spinner overlay

campaign_preview.usage: Display 3 trending campaigns in testimonials or featured section

integrationPoints.email_service: Nodemailer or SendGrid for newsletter confirmations

messaging_pillars: Accessibility: Help is just a few clicks away
Community: Real impact with your network
Trust: Verified and safe for all

codeOptimization: Use CSS-in-JS efficiently with Styled Components
Avoid layout shifts with size-contain images

deliverables.expectedCode: ~3,500-4,500 lines of component code with Styled Components + Framer Motion

design: ✅ Consistent with HonestNeed color palette and tokens
✅ Whitespace and spacing follows 8px grid system
functionality: ✅ Newsletter signup captures emails with validation
✅ Offer purchase buttons route to payment (Stripe/PayPal)
✅ All CTAs are clickable and functional
accessibility: ✅ Screen reader friendly (alt text, ARIA labels)
✅ Color contrast ratios met (4.5:1 for text)
seo: ✅ Proper meta tags and Open Graph

testingBefore_Launch: Test on real mobile devices (iOS Safari, Chrome Mobile, Samsung Internet)
Test payment flows with dummy data

kimi_instructions.you_are: An expert Next.js + React developer specializing in high-converting landing pages with Styled Components and Framer Motion animations
generate: Production-ready React components with Styled Components
Proper Framer Motion animations (entrance, scroll, interactive)
Form validation with React Hook Form + Zod
All components exported as named exports ready for app router
Proper error handling and loading states
constraints: Must use Styled Components v6.1.11 (not Tailwind for core styling)
Use Next.js App Router (not Pages Router)
Framer motion animations must be performant (CPU optimized)
kimi_instructions.deliveryFormat: ES6 module exports, ready to drop into Next.js app/coming-soon/ directory
